name: Floats
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and salt together.
2. Rub in the shortening until the mixture resembles bread crumbs.
3. Mix the yeast with a little warm water and add it to the flour mixture.
4. Knead lightly until smooth, then let rise until doubled in bulk.
5. Cut into pieces and roll into small balls. Allow to rise for 15 minutes.
6. Flatten each ball to 1/4 inch thick.
7. Fry in hot oil, drain well, and serve hot.
